pull_request.title: feat(internal/librarian/java): clean keeps version.java files
pull_request.body:
Adds regex for keeping Version.java files while cleaning. This regex is original from [owlbot.yaml template](https://github.com/googleapis/sdk-platform-java/blob/febe86f1ea4f0b5e6d8454024ed499adb7dc9328/hermetic_build/library_generation/templates/owlbot.yaml.monorepo.j2#L24) in google-cloud-java/sdk-platform-java.

Fix #4774

commit_summaries.message: add to test to verify a non-matching file is not preserved.
